selection_reasons.repair-falsify-5x3-efficient: pooled champion across 17 fresh panels: 92/222 exact; 39.2% weakest family

source: mechanical anchors plus iteration 20 Sol director

strategies.hypothesis: A single independent answer is the minimum-cost baseline.
strategies.name: Direct One

strategies.hypothesis: A small independent plurality is a stable low-cost baseline.
strategies.name: Five-Vote Plurality

strategies.hypothesis: Retain the pooled champion unchanged. Its parallel falsifying repair panel remains the principal replicated control for answer-generating review.
strategies.name: Efficient Five-Bank Falsifying Repair

strategies.hypothesis: Fill priority 1: replicate the pipeline unchanged. Blind lens diversity should continue increasing oracle coverage, while the terminal falsifying integrator tests whether that gain can be converted with a persistently positive correction balance on fresh cases.
strategies.name: Blind Regeneration then Falsifying Integration

strategies.hypothesis: Fill priority 2: retain the exact one-review mechanism as the clean call-efficiency comparison with the retained three-review champion. The test is whether its historically positive correction balance recovers without the reviewer dilution or extra calls of a panel.
strategies.name: One-Review Five-Bank Falsifying Repair

strategies.hypothesis: Fill priority 3: replicate sequential cross-examination as an orthogonal selection architecture. Passing one provisional answer and critique forward may focus later calls on falsifying decisive claims instead of producing three uncoordinated judgments.
strategies.name: Sequential Five-Bank Cross-Examination
